message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for to_numeric coercion (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering pd.to_numeric(series,
errors="coerce") parity:

- to_numeric_clean_strings ("1", "2.5", "100" -> Int/Float)
- to_numeric_with_invalid_coerces_to_nan (mixed parseable/garbage)
- to_numeric_already_numeric (Int64 passthrough)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs fp_frame::to_numeric(&series), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesToNumeric was already wired in
FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-w6pwa]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
